key_allostatic_mechanism: Reduced synaptic pruning efficiency and/or aberrant neuronal migration during corticogenesis, producing diminished cortico-cortical integration capacity
somatic_debt_threshold: Breath-hold < 20 s; saccade latency > 300 ms; chronic vagal withdrawal; elevated resting heart rate > 95 bpm

key_allostatic_mechanism: Disrupted phonologic-syntactic network integration within the left perisylvian cortex, involving the superior temporal gyrus, the inferior frontal gyrus, and the arcuate fasciculus connecting them
somatic_debt_threshold: Profound language impairment; absent perisylvian activation on fMRI

key_allostatic_mechanism: Disruption of the phonologic articulation circuit comprised of the left inferior frontal gyrus pars opercularis, ventral premotor cortex, motor cortex, cerebellum, and corticobulbar tract
somatic_debt_threshold: Corticobulbar conduction time severely prolonged; unable to produce intelligible speech

key_allostatic_mechanism: Basal ganglia-thalamocortical loop dysrhythmia affecting the left putamen and supplementary motor area, producing impaired initiation timing of the speech motor program
somatic_debt_threshold: Reduced putamen volume; right-lateralized speech activation; finger-tap asymmetry >15%; elevated galvanic skin response >5 microsiemens during speech

key_allostatic_mechanism: Underconnectivity of the fronto-temporo-parietal social cognition network — specifically the right temporoparietal junction, medial prefrontal cortex, and posterior superior temporal sulcus
somatic_debt_threshold: Absent mPFC activation during mentalizing tasks; profound pragmatic deficits

key_allostatic_mechanism: Polygenic neurodevelopmental disconnection syndrome characterized by altered excitation/inhibition ratio in cortical microcircuitry, aberrant long-range white matter connectivity, local hyperconnectivity, and striatal enlargement
somatic_debt_threshold: Pupillary adaptation <10%; antisaccade errors >30%; absent acoustic startle habituation

key_allostatic_mechanism: Hypofunction of the catecholaminergic fronto-striatal-cerebellar circuits with reduced dopaminergic and noradrenergic signaling
somatic_debt_threshold: Theta/beta ratio >4.0; RT variability >80 ms; delay discounting rate >0.05; elevated cortisol

key_allostatic_mechanism: Focal disruption of the cortical networks specialized for specific academic skills — reading (visual word form area), mathematics (intraparietal sulcus), or written expression (Exner area)

key_allostatic_mechanism: Cerebellar-cortical connectivity failure, specifically reduced P-cell output from cerebellar lobules IV-VI and Crus I/II resulting in impaired feedforward motor prediction

key_allostatic_mechanism: Striatal motor habit-circuit hyperexcitability with underactive indirect pathway producing motor capture
somatic_debt_threshold: Does not stop with distraction; self-injury present; requires physical protective measures

somatic_debt_threshold: Reduced putamen volume on MRI; urge suppression <5 s; continuous tics during rest

somatic_debt_threshold: Syndrome-specific markers; IQ <40; continuous supervision required

somatic_debt_threshold: Minimal verbal output; absent pragmatic understanding; severe social impairment

somatic_debt_threshold: Theta/beta ratio >3.5; digit span forward <5; RT variability >70 ms

somatic_debt_threshold: Inability to sit still for >2 min; continuous fidgeting; impaired Go/No-Go performance

somatic_debt_threshold: Positive toxicology matching symptom type; autonomic instability; elevated creatine kinase

phenotype_name: Psychotic Phenotype Due to Another Medical Condition
former_dsm5_name: Psychotic Disorder Due to Another Medical Condition

key_allostatic_mechanism: Uncharacterized elimination dysregulation with insufficient information for subtype specification
somatic_debt_threshold: Insufficient data for classification; organic pathology exclusion pending

key_allostatic_mechanism: Persistent hyperarousal of the HPA axis with failure of the ventrolateral preoptic nucleus (VLPO) to inhibit ascending arousal systems; conditioned cortical arousal overrides homeostatic sleep drive
somatic_debt_threshold: HR >80 bpm bedtime; elevated nocturnal norepinephrine; lack of HRV circadian modulation; sleep latency >30 min; >3 awakenings; daytime impairment

key_allostatic_mechanism: Heightened homeostatic sleep pressure with reduced threshold for sleep initiation despite adequate nocturnal sleep duration; CNS hyporesponsiveness to wake-promoting signals
somatic_debt_threshold: MSLT <8 min; spontaneous pupillary miosis; objective sleep efficiency <85% despite prolonged time in bed; sleep need >10 h; sleep inertia >30 min daily; involuntary naps

key_allostatic_mechanism: Autoimmune-mediated destruction of hypothalamic hypocretin (orexin)-producing neurons resulting in failure to stabilize wake-sleep boundaries and inappropriate REM intrusion
somatic_debt_threshold: CSF hypocretin <=110 pg/mL; >=2 SOREMPs; HLA-DQB1*06:02 positive; daily cataplexy; multiple SOREMPs; fragmented sleep; MSLT <5 min

key_allostatic_mechanism: Structural or functional narrowing of the pharyngeal airway resulting in repeated collapse during sleep when negative inspiratory pressure exceeds dilator muscle compensation
somatic_debt_threshold: SpO2 <90% for >10% of sleep; nocturnal BP non-dipper pattern; elevated morning catecholamines; AHI >=15 or >=5 with symptoms; ODI >=15

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dysregulation of brainstem ventilatory control centers resulting in high-loop-gain instability; chemoreflex response to CO2 fluctuation is excessive causing ventilatory overshoot and hypocapnia
somatic_debt_threshold: CAI >=15/hr; Cheyne-Stokes with heart failure; or opioid-related with ataxic breathing; LVEF <45%; PaCO2 <35 or >45; OSA-central overlap

key_allostatic_mechanism: Failure of the respiratory system to maintain adequate alveolar ventilation during sleep resulting in elevated PaCO2 and sustained hypoxemia; blunted central chemosensitivity or pump failure
somatic_debt_threshold: Awake PaCO2 >=50; sustained nocturnal SpO2 <85%; cor pulmonale signs; PHOX2B mutation; FVC <50% predicted; right heart strain on echo

key_allostatic_mechanism: Persistent mismatch between endogenous circadian pacemaker timing (SCN) and the environmental/social sleep-wake schedule due to behavioral, genetic, or environmental factors
somatic_debt_threshold: DLMO >2 hr misaligned; actigraphy shows consistent free-run or fragmentation; CBT nadir during desired waking hours; chronic insomnia/sleepiness; occupational/social failure

former_dsm5_name: Non-Rapid Eye Movement Sleep Arousal Disorders (Sleepwalking/Sleep Terrors)
key_allostatic_mechanism: Incomplete dissociation between NREM sleep and wakefulness; brain regions for complex motor behavior activate while prefrontal cortices remain in sleep
primary_proxy: Episode timing relative to sleep onset
somatic_debt_threshold: Frequent episodes (>1/week); injury risk; forensic involvement (driving, sexual behavior); documented from N3 on PSG; comorbid sleep apnea or RLS as triggers

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dysregulation of fear-extinction circuitry during REM sleep; amygdala generates threat simulations without adequate prefrontal-limbic modulation producing dysphoric narrative content
somatic_debt_threshold: >=1 nightmare/week; severe awakening distress; sleep avoidance; daytime impairment; reduced slow-wave sleep; REM fragmentation; elevated resting sympathetic tone

former_dsm5_name: Rapid Eye Movement Sleep Behavior Disorder
key_allostatic_mechanism: Progressive degeneration/dysfunction of brainstem circuits (sublaterodorsal nucleus) that normally inhibit spinal motor neurons during REM sleep; prodromal synucleinopathy
somatic_debt_threshold: Clinical RBD with injury; REM atonia loss >30% of REM; hyposmia; motor Parkinson signs (bradykinesia, rigidity, tremor); MCI; abnormal DaTscan

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dysfunctional central dopaminergic signaling in the diencephalic A11 nucleus and impaired iron transport across the blood-brain barrier resulting in sensorimotor cortex hyperexcitability at rest
somatic_debt_threshold: RLS >=3x/week; significant sleep-onset delay; ferritin <50 ng/mL; PLMS >15/hr; genetic risk variants; augmented on dopamine agonists

key_allostatic_mechanism: Pharmacological interference with neurotransmitter systems governing sleep-wake regulation; substances alter the balance between sleep-promoting and wake-promoting systems
somatic_debt_threshold: Chronic substance-induced sleep disruption persists >4 weeks after cessation; PSG abnormalities: reduced SWS, REM suppression, increased central apneas, PLMS >15/hr

key_allostatic_mechanism: Incomplete arousal/sleep architecture phenotype failing to meet full insomnia criteria but carrying sufficient allostatic load to cause functional impairment
somatic_debt_threshold: Nonrestorative sleep >3 months or other persistent partial phenotype; objective sleep disruption disproportionate to subjective complaint

key_allostatic_mechanism: Sleep disruption characteristic of insomnia without sufficient information determining its nature, duration, frequency, or relationship to other sleep-wake phenotypes
somatic_debt_threshold: Cannot be classified without further data; insomnia-rated distress present

key_allostatic_mechanism: Excessive sleep propensity that causes functional impairment but does not meet full hypersomnolence criteria; incomplete expression of the sleep drive dysregulation phenotype
somatic_debt_threshold: Episodic (Kleine-Levin variant) with severe functional impairment; episodic hypometabolism on SPECT; prolonged episodes >1 week

key_allostatic_mechanism: Excessive sleep propensity with insufficient clinical information to fully characterize its nature, duration, frequency, or relationship to other sleep-wake phenotypes
somatic_debt_threshold: Insufficient data for classification; hypersomnia-related distress present

key_allostatic_mechanism: Sleep-wake dysfunction causing clinically significant distress or impairment that does not meet full criteria for any specific phenotype
somatic_debt_threshold: Significant distress/impairment from unclassified sleep-wake disruption; requires individualized assessment

key_allostatic_mechanism: Sleep-wake dysregulation of unspecified nature where insufficient clinical data exist for precise mapping
somatic_debt_threshold: Pending further evaluation for classification

key_allostatic_mechanism: Decreased fast-conducting peripheral sensory nerve density in the pudendal and hypogastric pathways coupled with age-related sex steroid decline; serotonergic hypertonicity raises ejaculatory threshold
somatic_debt_threshold: IELT consistently absent or >20 min; absent nocturnal emissions; prolactin >20 ng/mL; delay on >75% of encounters; significant distress

somatic_debt_threshold: NPT rigidity <50%; PSV <30 cm/s; absent nocturnal erections; arterial calcification present; failure on >75% of occasions; 6+ months duration

somatic_debt_threshold: Threshold >3.5 microm; endurance <5 s; absent nocturnal orgasmic sensations; orgasmic on <25% or never; 6+ months

key_allostatic_mechanism: Hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian (HPO) axis underactivation reducing estradiol and free testosterone; lowered central dopaminergic tone in medial preoptic area; vaginal vasocongestion deficit
somatic_debt_threshold: Estradiol <30 pg/mL; free T <0.3 pg/mL; pH >5.0; interest <25% of opportunities; 6+ months

key_allostatic_mechanism: Pelvic floor hypertonicity with elevated EMG activity in pubococcygeus and levator ani muscles; vulvovaginal atrophy; peripheral nociceptor sensitization; central sensitization
somatic_debt_threshold: Resting EMG >5 microV; VMI <20% superficial; 3+ positive swab sites; pain >75% of attempts; complete avoidance; 6+ months

somatic_debt_threshold: T <300 ng/dL; prolactin >20 ng/mL; LH suppressed; absent spontaneous thoughts; no initiation for 6+ months

key_allostatic_mechanism: Hypersensitivity of the ejaculatory reflex arc due to reduced 5-HT2C/5-HT1B serotonin receptor density in the spinal ejaculation generator; hyperdopaminergic tone lowers ejaculatory threshold
somatic_debt_threshold: IELT <60 s on >75% of encounters; 6+ months; dorsal nerve velocity >35 m/s; PEDT >11; absent control

key_allostatic_mechanism: Pharmacological disruption of one or more nodes in the sexual response circuit: dopaminergic, serotonergic, endocrine, or autonomic effects depending on agent class
somatic_debt_threshold: Moderate-severe dysfunction on >50% of occasions; Naranjo score >4; prolactin >25 ng/mL; positive discontinuation challenge

key_allostatic_mechanism: Subthreshold disruption of one or more sexual circuit nodes not meeting full threshold for a specific phenotype but producing sufficient allostatic load to generate distress
somatic_debt_threshold: Distressing symptoms present but below full threshold; domain-specific biomarker above normal but below phenotype cut-off

key_allostatic_mechanism: Sexual circuit disruption of unspecified neurobiological origin where insufficient data exist to map the specific circuit node
somatic_debt_threshold: Distressing symptoms without identified mechanism; biomarker workup incomplete or inconclusive

key_allostatic_mechanism: Prenatal androgen milieu atypical for assigned gender creates sex-dimorphic brain organization that diverges from somatic sex development; central-peripheral sex configuration mismatch
somatic_debt_threshold: Full criteria including anatomic dysphoria for 6+ months; distress in social/school function; digit ratio sex-atypical; anogenital distance sex-atypical

phenotype_name: Gender Incongruence Phenotype — Adolescent and Adult

somatic_debt_threshold: Marked incongruence with natal sex characteristics; significant distress; 6+ months duration; flattened cortisol slope; HRV <25 ms; BDNF <20 ng/mL

key_allostatic_mechanism: Central gender map mismatch with assigned sex producing distress but not meeting full duration or symptom threshold criteria; BNSTc/INAH3 discordance of subthreshold intensity
somatic_debt_threshold: Distressing mismatch below full threshold; partial BNSTc discordance inferred; premorbid HPA dysregulation

key_allostatic_mechanism: Gender incongruence of unspecified origin where insufficient data exist to confirm the central gender map configuration

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dysregulation of prefrontal-limbic circuitry with chronically elevated amygdala reactivity and insufficient ventromedial PFC top-down inhibition; hypocortisolemic baseline with blunted autonomic arousal
somatic_debt_threshold: >4 symptoms across >2 settings; HR <60 bpm; cortisol <10 nmol/L at waking; low skin conductance

somatic_debt_threshold: Physical aggression with property damage; low 5-HIAA in CSF; elevated IL-6; structural OFC deficits

key_allostatic_mechanism: Multisystem dysregulation: reduced autonomic fear conditioning, frontotemporal-limbic structural deficits, and heightened threat-misperception in ambiguous social contexts

key_allostatic_mechanism: Convergent autonomic, neurostructural, and neurochemical aberrations producing a phenotype optimized for exploitative dominance in zero-sum social environments
somatic_debt_threshold: Full criteria with callous remorselessness; HR <65 bpm; absent startle; T:C ratio >0.05

somatic_debt_threshold: Multiple fire-setting episodes with pleasure; baseline HR <65 with >20 bpm increase during fire; dopamine reward signaling

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dysregulation of reward, impulse control, and affect-regulation circuits; stealing activates dopamine-mediated reward cycle from hypodopaminergic baseline through dopamine surge to opioid-mediated relief

former_dsm5_name: Unspecified Disruptive, Impulse-Control, and Conduct Disorder

key_allostatic_mechanism: Acute adenosine A1/A2A antagonism producing sympathetic hyperactivation: tachycardia, hypertension, psychomotor agitation, and sleep disruption at high doses

key_allostatic_mechanism: Acute CB1 receptor agonism producing altered sensory processing, impaired memory, psychomotor slowing, increased appetite, and tachycardia

key_allostatic_mechanism: Hyperactive error-monitoring in ACC with elevated conflict-related negativity; dorsal striatum overactivation in habitual control circuits; serotonergic dysfunction; elevated baseline sympathetic tone
primary_proxy: RSA during routine disruption / Pupillary response to errors
somatic_debt_threshold: Full criteria with rigidity, stubbornness, miserly spending; RSA drop >0.35 ln(ms2) during interruption; pupillary dilation >2 mm post-error; functional impairment

phenotype_name: Personality Change Due to Another Medical Condition
former_dsm5_name: Personality Change Due to Another Medical Condition
key_allostatic_mechanism: Acquired neuro-somatic reorganization secondary to demonstrable CNS pathology; personality change is direct consequence of structural or functional brain insult
primary_proxy: Frontal release signs / DTR asymmetry / Pupillary asymmetry
somatic_debt_threshold: Persistent personality change from baseline; confirmed CNS lesion or pathophysiology; frontal release signs present; neurological soft signs

key_allostatic_mechanism: Mixed neuro-somatic signatures not meeting full criteria for any specific phenotype but producing clinically significant functional impairment; overlapping dysregulation across systems
somatic_debt_threshold: 2+ markers above threshold; identifiable circuit dysregulation; significant impairment; no single phenotype threshold met

key_allostatic_mechanism: Undetermined due to insufficient data; reserved for emergency settings or presentations with inadequate information
somatic_debt_threshold: Insufficient information; full workup required before classification

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template ontogeny in which the reward circuitry is conditioned to non-consenting observation; ventral striatum dopamine release during covert watching exceeds dyadic interaction
primary_proxy: Pupillary response to covert vs. consenting sexual stimuli
somatic_debt_threshold: Acted out with nonconsenting person; preferential conditioning; orbitofrontal dysfunction; behavioral disinhibition; legal involvement

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template conditioned to exposing genitals to unsuspecting others; ventral striatum reward activation from viewer shock/fear response; sympathetic surge with parasympathetic collapse
somatic_debt_threshold: Multiple contact acts; legal involvement; preferential conditioning; orbitofrontal dysfunction; behavioral disinhibition

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template conditioned to non-consenting touch in crowded environments; somatosensory cortex hyperactivation during surreptitious contact; ventral striatum dopamine release
primary_proxy: RSA during proximity task / Pupillary response to touch imagery
somatic_debt_threshold: Multiple contact acts; legal involvement; disinhibited pattern; orbitofrontal hypoactivation

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template in which pain-humiliation-submission signals are conditioned to sexual reward; endogenous opioid release during painful stimulation creates euphoric reward binding
primary_proxy: RSA paradoxical increase / Pupillary response to threat vs. masochistic stimuli
somatic_debt_threshold: Acted out with nonconsenting person; dangerous practice; asphyxiophilia specifier; behavioral disinhibition; legal involvement

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template conditioned to inflicting suffering on others; amygdala hypoactivation to victim distress with ventral striatum hyperactivation during victim control; mirror neuron system fails to resonate
primary_proxy: RSA during pain-observation / Pupillometry to images of suffering
somatic_debt_threshold: Acted out with nonconsenting person; preferential conditioning; significant victim harm; legal involvement; behavioral disinhibition

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template oriented to prepubescent rather than mature secondary sexual characteristics; reduced amygdala response to adult sexual stimuli; enhanced ventral striatum response to prepubescent cues
primary_proxy: Viewing time (VTP) / Pupillary response to child vs. adult stimuli
somatic_debt_threshold: Acted out with child; preferential type; multiple victims; legal involvement; high recidivism risk; orbitofrontal and anterior cingulate dysfunction

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template in which nonliving objects or nongenital body parts are conditioned as primary sexual reward stimuli; somatosensory cortex hyperactivation to specific textures/materials
primary_proxy: Pupillary response to fetish object vs. normophilic stimuli
somatic_debt_threshold: Functional impairment when object unavailable; significant distress; behavioral disinhibition; legal involvement if acquisition involves theft

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template in which cross-dressing is conditioned to sexual reward; ventral striatum dopamine release during cross-dressing; autogynephilic subtype involves mesolimbic reward to self-female imagery
somatic_debt_threshold: Significant distress or impairment; conflict between arousal template and social identity; dual-identity management allostatic load

key_allostatic_mechanism: Arousal template conditioned to non-normophilic stimuli not covered by listed phenotypes; each variant involves specific sensory-limbic conditioning pathways
somatic_debt_threshold: Acted out with nonconsenting persons or dangerous practice; preferential conditioning; orbitofrontal dysfunction; behavioral disinhibition

key_allostatic_mechanism: Undetermined due to insufficient data; reserved for emergency settings or presentations with inadequate information
somatic_debt_threshold: Insufficient information for specific phenotyping; pending full evaluation

phenotype_name: Unspecified Somatic-Originating Presentation Due to Another Medical Condition
former_dsm5_name: Unspecified Mental Disorder Due to Another Medical Condition
key_allostatic_mechanism: Systemic metabolic or structural pathology producing neuro-somatic signal patterns that do not map to any defined phenotype template
somatic_debt_threshold: No medical etiology found OR medical treatment ineffective; signals entrained >90 days; CRP >10 mg/L; HRV <20 ms RMSSD; elevated IL-6

key_allostatic_mechanism: Convergent neuro-endocrine-immune signals fulfilling a clinician-named pattern not captured by existing module criteria
somatic_debt_threshold: Specified pattern continuous >6 months with systemic hardening; CAR flat; RMSSD <20 ms; elevated fibrinogen

key_allostatic_mechanism: Detectable allostatic dysregulation with insufficient information to map to any module or specification; intended solely for emergency or information-limited settings
somatic_debt_threshold: >72 hours without re-evaluation or no effort to specify; persistent autonomic dysregulation with no diagnostic framework

key_allostatic_mechanism: Acute D2 blockade in the substantia nigra-striatal pathway producing extrapyramidal hypokinesia; central D2 receptor occupancy >70% triggers thalamocortical motor circuit hardening
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe rigidity with immobility, falls, dysphagia; <10 taps/10 s; lead-pipe rigidity; unresponsive to dose reduction; elevated CK

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dopamine-depleting or D2-blocking effects from non-neuroleptic agents (metoclopramide, valproate) producing identical extrapyramidal hardware via different pharmacological entry points
somatic_debt_threshold: Rigidity with falls, aspiration risk; continued despite drug cessation; gait >15 s; glabellar >5; CK elevation

key_allostatic_mechanism: Acute D2 blockade-induced central thermoregulatory failure with massive catecholamine surge, skeletal muscle hypermetabolism, and autonomic dysregulation; mortality 10-20% if unmanaged
primary_proxy: Core temperature / Lead-pipe rigidity / Creatine kinase
somatic_debt_threshold: Full syndrome with stupor/coma, respiratory distress, rhabdomyolysis; temp >39.5 C; CK >5,000 U/L; metabolic acidosis; renal compromise

key_allostatic_mechanism: Acute D2 blockade causing unopposed cholinergic drive in basal ganglia, producing sustained extraocular, cervical, or truncal muscle contraction; hours-to-days onset after medication initiation
somatic_debt_threshold: Opisthotonos; laryngospasm; unable to override; stridor with desaturation; CK rise; inability to protect airway

key_allostatic_mechanism: D2 blockade-induced mesocortical dysregulation producing an unbearable inner restlessness expressed as compulsive lower-extremity movement
somatic_debt_threshold: Continuous pacing unable to sit; severe distress; self-report >7/10; cannot sit >30 s; medication refusal or violence risk; cortisol surge

key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic D2 blockade leading to dopamine receptor upregulation and maladaptive plasticity in the striatum; involuntary choreiform and athetoid movements after months to years of exposure
primary_proxy: Orofacial chorea / Truncal rocking / Finger chorea
somatic_debt_threshold: Movements visible at rest; unable to suppress; AIMS >8; dysarthria; difficulty retaining dentures; respiratory dyskinesia

key_allostatic_mechanism: Enhanced physiological tremor driven by medication-induced beta-adrenergic activation or altered ion channel function; lithium, antidepressants, and valproate are common triggers
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe tremor preventing feeding, drinking unassisted; constant spill; unable to sign name; caregiver dependence; social withdrawal

key_allostatic_mechanism: Movement signs not meeting specific criteria but temporally linked to medication exposure; includes tardive dystonia, tardive akathisia, and NMS-like presentations from non-neuroleptic agents
primary_proxy: Temporal medication anchoring / Movement pattern characterization
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe movement with systemic involvement; CK >3x normal; autonomic instability; unable to discontinue medication; persistent >6 months

key_allostatic_mechanism: Abrupt cessation of antidepressant therapy producing rapid drop in synaptic monoamine levels; brainstem and sensory thalamus become hyperexcitable generating characteristic electric-shock sensations
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe sensory symptoms with inability to function; suicidal ideation or need for immediate rescue reinstatement; functional collapse without taper

key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic interpersonal stress within the parent-child dyad producing prolonged HPA axis activation in both parties; child's developing neuro-endocrine-immune axis undergoes allostatic entrainment
primary_proxy: Cortisol synchrony mismatch / HRV co-regulation deficit
somatic_debt_threshold: Pattern continuous >12 months; physical threats or estrangement; child or parent has somatic phenotype; flat cortisol; HRV <20 ms; CRP elevation in child

key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic sibling conflict or scapegoating producing sustained sympathetic arousal and competition-driven HPA dysregulation in the targeted sibling
somatic_debt_threshold: Continuous pattern with physical injury risk; parental differential treatment evident; targeted sibling with flat cortisol; HRV <20 ms; elevated BP

former_dsm5_name: Relationship Distress With Spouse or Intimate Partner
key_allostatic_mechanism: Sustained relational conflict producing mutual HPA and cardiovascular dysregulation; partners develop synchronous but elevated cortisol profiles with blunted diurnal slopes
primary_proxy: Partner cortisol concordance / Conflict recovery time
somatic_debt_threshold: Pattern >18 months; threats, contempt, or stonewalling present; one partner meets mood-related phenotype criteria; flat cortisol; HRV <20 ms; hypertension

former_dsm5_name: High Expressed Emotion Level Within Family
key_allostatic_mechanism: A family environment characterized by hostility, emotional overinvolvement, and frequent criticism; acts as a chronic environmental allostatic load amplifier increasing relapse risk
somatic_debt_threshold: Hostile family climate; member has relapsed phenotype; HRV <20 ms; flat cortisol; inflammatory markers elevated

key_allostatic_mechanism: Non-accidental physical trauma to a child producing immediate tissue injury and long-term HPA axis reprogramming; patterned injury locations and inconsistent histories distinguish from accidental trauma
primary_proxy: Full-body skin examination / Radiographic skeletal survey
somatic_debt_threshold: Confirmed non-accidental injury; child remains in unsafe environment; multiple healing fractures at different stages; flat CAR; CRP elevated

phenotype_name: Child Sexual Abuse Neuro-Somatic Injury Phenotype
key_allostatic_mechanism: Sexual trauma during development producing pelvic floor hypertonicity, altered HPA reactivity, and neuro-immune reprogramming; presentation often delayed with somatic signals preceding disclosure
somatic_debt_threshold: Confirmed contact with physical findings; or suspected with severe dysregulation; flat cortisol; anogenital scarring; pelvic floor dysfunction

phenotype_name: Adult Partner Physical Assault Injury Phenotype
key_allostatic_mechanism: Non-accidental physical injury inflicted by an intimate partner producing patterned injury and sustained hypervigilance with autonomic exhaustion
primary_proxy: Central injury distribution / Defensive wound pattern
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe or repeated assault with strangulation, weapon use, or loss of consciousness; refusal or inability to leave; HRV <20 ms; flat cortisol; prior head trauma signs

key_allostatic_mechanism: Omission of care for a dependent partner leading to preventable deterioration in nutrition, hygiene, medical management, and safety; chronic HPA activation from unmet survival needs
primary_proxy: Body mass decline / Pressure injury assessment
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe neglect with malnutrition, infection, or avoidable hospitalization; >10% weight loss; stage 3+ pressure ulcer; sepsis; electrolyte derangement

phenotype_name: Educational Access and Performance Stress Phenotype
key_allostatic_mechanism: Sustained mismatch between environmental educational demands and individual neurocognitive capacity or opportunity producing chronic performance anxiety, HPA activation, and learning inhibition
primary_proxy: Performance-capacity gap / School refusal somatic signs
somatic_debt_threshold: Complete school disengagement; somatic phenotype present; functional illiteracy; absenteeism >15 days/month; flat cortisol; HRV <20 ms

phenotype_name: Occupational Stress and Role Dysfunction Phenotype
key_allostatic_mechanism: Sustained mismatch between occupational demands and individual capacity, resources, or safety; chronic work stress produces elevated catecholamines, disrupted sleep, and cardiovascular strain
somatic_debt_threshold: Job loss, disability claiming, or occupational illness; full physiological dysregulation; flat cortisol; HRV <20 ms; hypertension; sick leave >30 days

key_allostatic_mechanism: Absence of safe, stable, and adequate shelter producing sustained cold/heat exposure, sleep disruption, nutritional insufficiency, and chronic HPA and immune activation
primary_proxy: Shelter status verification / Environmental exposure index
somatic_debt_threshold: Chronic homelessness >6 months with exposure-related illness; BMI <18.5; albumin <3.0; hypothermia or hyperthermia injury; infectious disease

former_dsm5_name: Extreme Poverty / Low Income / Food Insecurity
key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic resource scarcity producing food insecurity, water insecurity, and sustained cortisol elevation; scarcity mindset itself activates sympathetic nervous system and impairs executive function
primary_proxy: Food security status / Water access frequency
somatic_debt_threshold: Severe poverty with chronic hunger, unsafe water, and no social safety net; flat cortisol; BMI <18.5; waterborne illness; stunting in children

key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic social pain from bullying, ostracism, or discrimination activates dorsal ACC and anterior insula — same neural circuitry as physical pain; sustained activation produces HPA dysregulation and inflammatory upregulation
primary_proxy: Social pain recall / Ecological momentary assessment
somatic_debt_threshold: Chronic severe exclusion with complete social isolation; bullying with physical injury; CRP >10 mg/L; HRV <20 ms; flat cortisol; trauma signs

key_allostatic_mechanism: Neuro-endocrine adaptation demands of navigating a new cultural environment; dissonance between familiar somatic norms and new cultural expectations produces sustained vigilance and sleep disruption
primary_proxy: Cultural unfamiliarity index / Circadian shift burden
somatic_debt_threshold: Migration <1 year ago OR refugee/asylee status; no host language; social isolation; flat cortisol; sleep <5 h; HRV <20 ms; multiple somatic complaints

key_allostatic_mechanism: Neuro-endocrine reorganization during normative developmental transitions (puberty, parenthood, menopause, retirement); temporary destabilization as system adapts to new homeostatic demands
primary_proxy: Developmental epoch mapping / Allostatic reorganization index
somatic_debt_threshold: Transition-related distress >6 months with functional collapse; pre-existing vulnerability; second phenotype emerges; flat cortisol; HRV <20 ms

key_allostatic_mechanism: Subthreshold dopaminergic and glutamatergic dysregulation in mesolimbic and prefrontal circuits producing aberrant but reality-anchored perceptual and interpretive signals; pre-transition state of heightened plasticity
somatic_debt_threshold: Symptoms nearly daily; marked distress; functional decline >15 points; progression to full psychosis risk >30% at 3 years; progressive gray matter reduction

key_allostatic_mechanism: Mood-state oscillation between low-energy and high-energy set points with hypomanic phase lasting 2-3 days; system fails to maintain homeostatic mood stability
primary_proxy: Hypomanic window duration / Depressive episode confirmation
somatic_debt_threshold: Frequent cycling with severe depressive episodes; suicide attempt history; sleep <5 h; step count >75% increase; elevated suicide risk

key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic attachment system dysregulation following death of a close other; HPA axis, vagal system, and immune network fail to downregulate grief response beyond 12 months
somatic_debt_threshold: Yearning constant; identity collapse; suicidal ideation; medical morbidity (cardiac, immune) at 12+ months; flat cortisol; CRP >10 mg/L

key_allostatic_mechanism: Chronic adenosine receptor upregulation from daily caffeine intake producing tolerance, withdrawal on cessation, and continued use despite harm
somatic_debt_threshold: Daily use >500 mg; continued use despite medical harm; functional impairment from withdrawal or intoxication; tachycardia at rest; insomnia; anxiety

key_allostatic_mechanism: Dopaminergic reward system entrainment to intermittent variable-ratio reinforcement schedules in online multiplayer games; mesolimbic dopamine pathway hijack producing tolerance and withdrawal dysphoria
somatic_debt_threshold: Gaming >30 h/week; weight loss; sleep deprivation; role loss (job/academic failure); deception about use; BMI <18.5; sleep debt >3 h/night; HRV <20 ms

former_dsm5_name: Neurobehavioral Disorder Associated With Prenatal Alcohol Exposure
key_allostatic_mechanism: Teratogenic alcohol exposure during gestation producing structural and functional CNS alterations including reduced corpus callosum volume, basal ganglia abnormalities, and disrupted frontal-executive circuitry
primary_proxy: Gestational alcohol confirmation / Global intellectual function
somatic_debt_threshold: Documented exposure + IQ <=70 or severe executive dysfunction; marked adaptive deficits; Vineland adaptive composite <70; comorbid ADHD/ODD

key_allostatic_mechanism: Discrete behavioral event driven by severe allostatic overload wherein the individual initiates a self-directed sequence of actions with expectation of death
somatic_debt_threshold: >1 attempt in 24 months; high-lethality method; current intent; personality phenotype present; flat cortisol; CRP >10 mg/L; serotonin transporter binding reduced

key_allostatic_mechanism: Repeated self-inflicted tissue damage without suicidal intent driven by endogenous opioid dysregulation; the act releases beta-endorphins producing relief
primary_proxy: Injury pattern documentation / Endogenous opioid response
somatic_debt_threshold: >20 episodes/year; multiple methods; escalating severity; dependence on behavior for affect regulation; blunted baseline beta-endorphin; marked pain threshold elevation
